description: IPGeolocation.io provides IP geolocation, network intelligence, threat signals, and related lookup services through real-time APIs and downloadable IP databases. Its products cover IP location, security, ASN, abuse-contact, timezone, astronomy, and user-agent parsing data.
summary: IPGeolocation.io exposes a documented HTTP API suite for IP/location/security/timezone/ASN/user-agent/astronomy data, an official CLI, and an official MCP server page; the APIs and CLI use an IPGeolocation.io API key, while MCP connection/auth details were not clearly published on the scraped pages.
